response.text:
Yes — I can work with your MSO6B scope in this session.

I can help with:
- measurements and triggers
- SCPI / tm_devices setup
- screenshots and saves
- debugging what you’re seeing on the scope

I can’t physically press buttons on the instrument, but I can guide the setup or build the flow/commands for it.

If you want, send me what you’re trying to measure, or say “build it” and I’ll set up the flow.
